introduction.p: For each interval expressed in the number lines, write the interval using set-builder notation.

solution.p: Since all numbers less than or equal to 2 are shaded, the set-builder notation is {\{ x \mid x \le 2 \}}\text{.}
Since all numbers less than to 2 are shaded, the set-builder notation is {\{ x \mid x \lt 2 \}}\text{.}
Since all numbers greater than or equal to 2 are shaded, the set-builder notation is {\{ x \mid x \ge 2 \}}\text{.}
